title: The Breathtaking Roof of the World: Machu Picchu

scenes.text: An incredible ancient city perched at over 2,400 meters high.
This is Machu Picchu, located in the Andes Mountains in Peru.
This site was built in the 15th century and is renowned for its sophisticated dry-stone construction.
Machu Picchu is often enveloped in mystical clouds.
scenes.label: MYSTICAL CLOUDS

scenes.text: Follow for places that don't feel real.

description: 📍 Machu Picchu, Andes Mountains - Peru. An ancient Inca city that rises dramatically above the clouds, showcasing remarkable construction. Follow for daily hidden places! 🌍
